title: [MTR3]Chongqing Rail Transit QKZ2 monorail train
description: A train pack for MTR mod
body:
# 简体中文
一个重庆轨道交通2号线的日本进口单轨车辆（已退出运营。）

本包内不包含单轨轨道，需要使用其他资源包内的轨道（如[这个](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/chongqing-metro-monorail-train-pack)）

建议使用[NTE](https://modrinth.com/mod/mtr-nte)获得更好性能。
# English
A Hitachi monorail train made by Japan of Chongqing Rail Transit Line 2 (Retired).

No monorail railway were inclouded at the pack, so a rail from other pack is requested(like [this](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/chongqing-metro-monorail-train-pack))

Recommend to use [NTE](https://modrinth.com/mod/mtr-nte) for better performance.
